title: Japanese Zha Mian
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring zha (dried soybeans) and mian (Japanese noodles), stir-fried with jiang (fermented soybean paste) and midnight sauce. Savor the rich flavors and textures of this savory noodle dish.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped green onions and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the soaked zha and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the jiang (fermented soybean paste) and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the mian (Japanese noodles) and cook until they are well coated with the sauce, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the midnight sauce and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter or individual plates.
Garnish with additional green onions and serve immediately.
